pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + MLP 3.5× + Mixed int5/int6 + Brotli — 1.1125 BPB (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fuse Triton TMA/CUTLASS EVT MLP kernels, widen MLP to 3.5×, and pair Hessian-ranked mixed int5/int6 GPTQ with Brotli compression.
techniques: - Fused Triton TMA forward and CUTLASS EVT backward kernels with precomputed activation gradient for the squared LeakyReLU MLP.
- Expand MLP width to 3.5× guided by SVD-ranked capacity analysis while using Hessian-ranked mixed int5/int6 GPTQ to stay under budget.
- Brotli-11 payload compression and LR floor warmdown to fit the 16 MB cap without retraining regressions.
